misc.text: ⚠️ BREAKING NEWS ⚠️ 🎼 ONE PIECE ANIME MUSIC COMPOSER KOHEI TANAKA TEASES NEW ELBAPH SOUNDTRACKS & OST! 🌊🔥 “For the Elbaph Arc, I composed a lot of brand-new background music, and I’m full of motivation! Now then… what kind of theme will Loki have? I guarantee it will be grand and epic in scale!” ⚡🎻 — Kohei Tanaka —

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 I really want to know why the Nidhogg Fruit is so important to Xebec for the fight against Imu; what kind of effect is it supposed to have? The other fruit will be the Yami Fruit (since
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 I really want to know why the Nidhogg Fruit is so important to Xebec for the fight against Imu; what kind of effect is it supposed to have? The other fruit will be the Yami Fruit (since Xebec didn't know anything about Sun God Nika), which raises the question of why the Nidhogg Fruit and Yami Fruit were so important for Xebec? I get the yami fruit, but Nidhogg, does the Nidhogg fruit has a special power aside the lightning power?
